message:
test(unit): expand inline tests for recorder_query, extensions (+43) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

recorder_query.rs: +32 tests covering RecorderQueryRequest/TimeRange/QueryEventKind/
QueryStats/QueryPlan/ElevationGrant/QueryError/EventFilter/InMemoryEventStore/
QueryStatsAggregator trait impls (Debug/Clone/Copy/PartialEq/Eq/Hash/serde),
edge cases (single-point TimeRange, zero-TTL ElevationGrant, mask_text boundary
at len=8/9, QueryStats serde skips duration).

extensions.rs: +11 tests covering ExtensionSource/ExtensionInfo/ExtensionDetail/
ExtensionRuleInfo/ValidationResult Debug/Clone/serde roundtrips, ExtensionSource
serde snake_case and PartialEq all variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
